The exploitation requires a few permissions to be enabled in the used GraphQL schema:

* "Edit assets in the <VolumeName> volume"
* "Create assets in the <VolumeName> volume"

## Details

The implementation fails to restrict the URL Scheme. While the application is intended to "upload assets", there is no whitelist forcing `http` or `https`. This allows attackers to use the Gopher protocol to wrap raw TCP commands.

**Impact:** Combined with the DWORD bypass, an attacker can hit internal services without triggering any "127.0.0.1" string-matching filters.

**Example Payload:** gopher://2130706433:6379/_FLUSHALL (Targets local Redis via DWORD).

**Remediation Strategy**

To prevent mathematical IP obfuscation, the application must normalize the hostname before validation.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00275, "percentile": 0.19038}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3m9m-24vh-39wx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-14T23:35:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3m9m-24vh-39wx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3m9m-24vh-39wx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41129"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T00:16:28Z", "published_at": "2026-04-14T23:35:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/craftcms/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-3m9m-24vh-39wx", "https://github.com/craftcms/cms/commit/d20aecfaa0eae076c4154be3b17e1f9fa05ce46f", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41129", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3m9m-24vh-39wx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/craftcms/cms/security-advisories/GHSA-3m9m-24vh-39wx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/craftcms/cms", "summary": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in Craft CMS with Asset Uploads Mutations", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:42:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3m9m-24vh-39wx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.9.15", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0-RC1, <= 5.9.14"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.17.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0-RC1, <= 4.17.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in Craft CMS with Asset Uploads Mutations
